skill_invocation: invokeMarketingSkill("emails", { subjectLine, customerContext, brandVoice, intent: "alternate phrasing", originalBody }, { variants: 2 })
anchor_subject: Got your deposit. Build clock starts now.
brand_voice: Operator. Jack writes the email, not 'we'. No 'thank you for choosing us' — the deposit already cleared. Plain, concrete, no exclamation points. Signed '— Jack / Day14'.

input.subjectLine: Got your deposit. Build clock starts now.

customerContext.scenario: Transactional confirmation triggered by Stripe checkout.session.completed (metadata event=deposit). Customer just paid. Goal: confirm receipt, kick off the 14-day clock, set 18-hour expectations.
customerContext.topic: Stripe deposit received — 14-day build clock starts now. Intake form link + preview-URL ETA in the body.

originalBody:
Got your deposit. {{customer_first_name}}, the 14-day clock starts today.

Two things from me in the next 18 hours:

1. The intake form — one page, 8 minutes: {{intake_url}}
2. A preview URL on a *.day14.dev subdomain, by tomorrow 6pm ET

Then a one-paragraph update from me every weekday at 6pm ET until launch.

Faster than email for anything urgent: text me at {{jack_phone}}.

— Jack
Day14
